activeFixIt.body: Within the main dashboard, there is some navigation language and workflow logic that is causing confusion. The objective task categories currently displayed on the main dashboard are: Open Overdue Due Today Due Within 7 Days Due Within 14 Days Due Within 28 Days Completed These are good and should be considered the core visuals for team productivity. Howeve…

pendingApproval.summary: Dashboard/Objectives filter IA request remains product-direction, not a proven broken workflow.
OKRs and Projects tracking/R&D is a planning and process-design objective, not an obvious bug fix.

assessment.summary: No new user-generated production bugs or clear Jake/Mercileidy implementation asks appeared since the last 9 AM review. Activity was limited to repeated agent/admin comments on the already-open Dashboard/Objectives IA card plus normal delivery logs.
notes: No new Fix-It posts, attachments, objective messages, objective_updates, or org_chart_updates were created in this window.

Five new comments landed on the same active Fix-It card 23903eed-1900-4fa6-964e-7beafaa1e7e9; all were agent/admin rechecks reaffirming that production already behaves like a centralized Objective Lens.

Fifteen objectives share the same updated_at timestamp (2026-06-11T15:31:42.479396+00:00) without matching objective_updates or messages; treat that as system-side churn unless future audits show substantive field deltas.
